---
title: "Statistical inference for Ecologists"
subtitle: "BIOC13 Spring 2026 (VT 26)"
---

[![](https://zenodo.org/badge/971224551.svg)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19782118)

Here you will find all the materials required for the statistics section of
BIOC13.

All course communication should take place on [LU
Canvas](https://canvas.education.lu.se/courses/36302).

For access to materials from previous semesters, see the [releases on
GitHub](https://github.com/irmoodie/bioc13) or
[Zenodo](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19782118).
